pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require the script to be saved at this path.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require the ODT report to be saved at this path.
A simulation of the noisy angle generation script in setup_task.sh confirms that calculating the per-row index of refraction and averaging them consistently rounds to exactly 1.52.
With an average index of refraction of 1.52, the corresponding material from the prompt reference table is Crown Glass, which satisfies the glass string search in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires calculating the average index of refraction from synthetically generated angle measurements created by setup_task.sh. Mathematical simulation of the task data generation logic confirms that computing the index of refraction for each of the 8 angle pairs and averaging the results consistently rounds to exactly 1.52. This correctly identifies the material as Crown Glass from the provided reference table. The required python script and output report paths explicitly match the task description and verifier logic.
